w:document.mc:Ignorable: w14 w15 w16se w16cid w16 w16cex w16sdtdh wp14

w:r.w:t: Build a production-ready educational platform where students and teachers can upload, explore, rate, like, and download creative works.
Platform must be secure, scalable, and usable in real school environments.
These categories are fixed and must be enforced at database level.
“Explore, learn and enjoy our students’ work.”
pdf, txt, jpg, png, mp3, mp4, zip
Each approved content item must support:
Approval moves or copies file to public.
Static frontend compatible with GitHub Pages.
